untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Historical mean (µ) calculation from Ornstein-Uhlenbeck model—not available in allowed indicators; (2) Half-life threshold computation—requires stochastic process analysis beyond standard technical indicators; (3) Entry conditions completely unspecified (AUTHOR_SILENT). Used sma_20 as a proxy for historical mean, but this does not capture the true mean-reversion framework intended by the signal.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally untranslatable with standard technical indicators because it relies on mean-reverting process parameters (µ from O-U formula, half-life decay rate) that require time-series statistical modeling. The allowed indicator set lacks: (a) a true historical mean calculator, (b) half-life measurement tools, (c) mean-reversion strength metrics. Entry conditions are completely absent from the source material. Substituted sma_20 as a rough proxy for mean, but this is not statistically equivalent to the Ornstein-Uhlenbeck mean target. For proper implementation, this signal requires custom indicators for mean calculation and half-life detection.
